description.ko: 백색광이 투명한 프리즘을 통과하며 찬란한 무지개 빛깔로 분산되는 광학 현상을 예술적이고 정교하게 시각화한 테마입니다.
description.en: A stunning visual exploration of optical physics, capturing the moment white light splits into its constituent colors through a crystalline prism.

prompt: Hyper-realistic 3D render of a triangular glass prism positioned on a minimalist dark surface. A single, sharp beam of white light enters the prism and exits as a vibrant, perfectly dispersed rainbow spectrum. Intricate caustic patterns, soft volumetric lighting, chromatic aberration, 8k resolution, cinematic atmosphere, sharp focus on the internal light refraction.
